series_metadata.series_description: Agency wide inventory of properties prepared by the head of a state agency before leaving office and submitted to his/her successor in office as required by ORC 117.17. Contains an inventory of all properties, supplies, furniture, credits, and moneys, and any other items belonging to the State of Ohio. Information includes name of item, agency tag number, serial number, location, dollar amount and any other pertinent information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retained until scanned and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: 4 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
